title: Silicone Air Fryer Liners for Russell Hobbs XXL 8L 27170-56, 3PCS Airfryer Accessories Silicone Mould for Russell Hobbs XXL 8.3 L 27632-56 Reusable Silicone Non-Stick
features: 🎁【Perfectly Compatible with Russell Hobbs Air Fryer XXL 8L】Our reusable air fryer silicone mould is designed specifically for Russell Hobbs 27170-56 XXL 8L and 27632-56 XXL 8.3L. The large-capacity silicone mould is ideal for use at various gatherings. The silicone material is foldable for storage and does not take up space when not in use.

🌭【Meet Different Cooking Requirements】Equipped with two types of silicone moulds, the one-piece large-capacity air fryer mould can cook large quantities of food at once. The two-in-one silicone mould can cook two different foods at the same time, preventing odours from mixing and saving time and electricity.

🔥【Food-grade Silicone High-temperature Resistant Material】The silicone moulds for our air fryer are made of food-grade silicone, which is reusable, environmentally friendly, non-stick, BPA-free, and resistant to scratches, wear, tearing, and stains, with a heat resistance of up to 230°C/450°F. Whether you're preparing crispy baked fish, grilled meat, fries, or fluffy desserts, these air fryer accessories ensure you and your family can cook safely and healthily.

🍕【Keep Your Air Fryer Clean and Easy to Clean】Using silicone moulds can protect your air fryer basket from grease contamination, protect the non-stick coating, and extend the life of your air fryer. Our silicone moulds are designed with 9 cm high edges to effectively protect your air fryer, prevent grease and food debris from entering, extend the life of your air fryer, and reduce cleaning time.

🍟【Oil Drainage Design】During cooking, the patented ‘central protrusion + radial guide groove’ design ensures air circulation and even heat distribution, preventing oil from seeping into food. Oil automatically slides into the surrounding grooves, separating food from the oil layer and improving the efficiency of water evaporation at the bottom by 80%. Even roasted vegetables will be crispier.

🥪【Wide range of Applications】In addition to air fryers, this versatile silicone accessory is also perfect for use with a variety of kitchen appliances, including ovens, microwaves, steamers and refrigerators. It can be used for everything from everyday dishes such as French fries and baked fish to party desserts, and is suitable for both indoor cooking and outdoor activities such as camping and barbecuing. It can also be used to store food and fruit, making it an essential item for any kitchen.
